safest_plan.entry_basis: Zero live chart (2025-06-09) HTF demand band ~0.0000115-0.0000120, labelled 'interested in building a position here (spot)'. NOT the text-extracted 0.00001234-0.00001250, which the chart marks as a bearish breaker / resistance price is using to push lower.

targets.basis: Zero grade HTF take-profit zone / the bearish-breaker supply band on the chart (~0.0000135-0.0000140) as first bounce target
Zero live chart 'first important HTF TP zone' (~0.0000160), only on a close back above the swing high

safest_plan.stop_basis: 12h/daily close below the HTF demand zone (the '1150s' SL Zero notes); a close below flips the read bearish toward the deeper 0.0000090-0.0000096 spot zone

stance_by_source.summary: A patient spot accumulator: expects price to dip into the demand zone around 0.0000115-0.0000120 first, wants to buy there (only if it lines up with his other charts), and would only chase higher if price closes back above the swing high near 0.0000160.

conflicts: The earlier text extraction pulled a buy at roughly today's price (0.00001234-0.00001250), but the chart labels that exact area a 'bearish breaker' that price is leaning on to fall further — the genuine spot-buy band is the demand zone lower down at about 0.0000115-0.0000120.

The grade's take-profit (0.0000135) is well below the chart's drawn 'first important take-profit zone' near 0.0000160, so the chart implies more upside room than the text once a buy actually triggers.
plain_english: Zero is in no rush here — he is a spot buyer waiting for a cheaper price, and his chart actually expects Shiba Inu to drift lower into a buy zone around 0.0000115 to 0.0000120 before he steps in. Buying at today's price (~0.0000124) goes against that, because the chart marks this area as a ceiling the price is using to push down, not a floor. The plan that respects the chart is to wait: let price fall into roughly 0.0000115-0.0000120 and buy there, treating a daily close below 0.0000115 as the signal to step aside (with an even deeper buy zone near 0.0000090-0.0000096 if that breaks). For now, do nothing and wait for the dip.
